overall.description: Gameplay footage from Horizon Zero Dawn showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a flooded post-apocalyptic urban landscape. She wades through shallow water among massive ruined skyscrapers, swims across a section of the flooded city, and emerges onto a rocky shoreline while the camera follows in third-person perspective. The scene features dramatic golden hour lighting with god rays breaking through scattered clouds.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban ruins with shallow water

events.description: character transitions from standing still to walking forward through the shallow water

agents.ego_description: wading slowly through shallow water along the shoreline, observing the massive ruined skyscrapers in the distance

entered.detail: tall, heavily damaged skyscraper ruin with twisted metal framework rising from the water
tall, twisted skyscraper ruin with distinctive criss-cross metal pattern
single tree growing in the shallow water with exposed roots
rocky edge of the shore with grass and small vegetation

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing in shallow water facing a vast flooded landscape. Two massive ruined skyscrapers dominate the horizon under a partly cloudy sky with golden sunlight breaking through. The character begins walking through the water, passing a solitary tree growing in the lake, while the camera follows from behind in third-person perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep water channel between ruined structures

events.description: character transitions from wading to swimming as the water becomes deeper

agents.ego_description: swimming through the deeper water toward the rocky shore and the towering ruins ahead

segments.scene_description: The character swims through deeper water, leaving the solitary tree behind. The two massive ruined towers remain visible, with the right tower growing larger as the character approaches the opposite shore. The water creates ripples and splashes around the character as she swims forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline with grass and scattered vegetation

events.description: character emerges from the water onto the rocky shore and transitions back to walking
character moves from rocky shore onto grassy terrain with denser vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky and grassy shoreline away from the water, heading toward higher ground with scattered bushes

entered.detail: grass-covered hillside with patches of red and green vegetation

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the water onto a rocky shore and continues walking onto grassy terrain. The twisted ruined tower on the right remains a dominant feature in the background while the character moves away from the water's edge. The ground transitions from wet rocks to dry grass and scattered vegetation as the character explores the shoreline.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a flooded urban ruin, transitioning from a shallow lake to a rocky shoreline. It begins with the character wading through shallow water toward two massive ruined skyscrapers that dominate the horizon under a golden, partly cloudy sky. As the character passes a solitary tree growing from the lake, the scene shifts into a swimming sequence where the water deepens and ripples around her, bringing the twisted tower on the right into closer view. The camera then follows her as she emerges from the water onto a rocky shore, with the terrain gradually transitioning from wet stones to dry grass and scattered vegetation. Finally, the character continues walking inland, moving away from the water's edge while the ruined tower remains a dominant feature in the background.
